title: Privacy Policy
raw_content:
Who we are

Suggested text: Our website address is: http://localhost/goods.nevenshop.com.

Comments

Suggested text: When visitors leave comments on the site we collect the data shown in the comments form, and also the visitor’s IP address and browser user agent string to help spam detection.

An anonymized string created from your email address (also called a hash) may be provided to the Gravatar service to see if you are using it. The Gravatar service privacy policy is available here: https://automattic.com/privacy/. After approval of your comment, your profile picture is visible to the public in the context of your comment.

Media

Suggested text: If you upload images to the website, you should avoid uploading images with embedded location data (EXIF GPS) included. Visitors to the website can download and extract any location data from images on the website.

Cookies

Suggested text: If you leave a comment on our site you may opt-in to saving your name, email address and website in cookies. These are for your convenience so that you do not have to fill in your details again when you leave another comment. These cookies will last for one year.

If you visit our login page, we will set a temporary cookie to determine if your browser accepts cookies. This cookie contains no personal data and is discarded when you close your browser.

When you log in, we will also set up several cookies to save your login information and your screen display choices. Login cookies last for two days, and screen options cookies last for a year. If you select "Remember Me", your login will persist for two weeks. If you log out of your account, the login cookies will be removed.

If you edit or publish an article, an additional cookie will be saved in your browser. This cookie includes no personal data and simply indicates the post ID of the article you just edited. It expires after 1 day.

Embedded content from other websites

Suggested text: Articles on this site may include embedded content (e.g. videos, images, articles, etc.). Embedded content from other websites behaves in the exact same way as if the visitor has visited the other website.

These websites may collect data about you, use cookies, embed additional third-party tracking, and monitor your interaction with that embedded content, including tracking your interaction with the embedded content if you have an account and are logged in to that website.

Who we share your data with

Suggested text: If you request a password reset, your IP address will be included in the reset email.

How long we retain your data

Suggested text: If you leave a comment, the comment and its metadata are retained indefinitely. This is so we can recognize and approve any follow-up comments automatically instead of holding them in a moderation queue.

For users that register on our website (if any), we also store the personal information they provide in their user profile. All users can see, edit, or delete their personal information at any time (except they cannot change their username). Website administrators can also see and edit that information.

What rights you have over your data

Suggested text: If you have an account on this site, or have left comments, you can request to receive an exported file of the personal data we hold about you, including any data you have provided to us. You can also request that we erase any personal data we hold about you. This does not include any data we are obliged to keep for administrative, legal, or security purposes.

Where your data is sent

Suggested text: Visitor comments may be checked through an automated spam detection service.

children.content: We have a high standard factory located in Shenzhen City China with tobacco product license.

Based in Shenzhen, China, our state-of-the-art office works beneath a licensed tobacco generation system. Shenzhen Zhongou E-commerce Brand Operation Co., Ltd, a nicotine vape brands, was set up in 2019 by a team of industry veterans with profound roots within the disposable vape.

We offer end-to-end solutions—including investigate and advancement, manufacturing, global sales, coordination, and after-sales support for clients. Our product lineup ranges a wide extend of disposable vapes, pod systems, vape starter kits, electronic liquid, and specialized hardware, all crafted to meet market demands and high-quality standards.

title: About Us

children.content:
Shenzhen Zhongou E-commerce Brand Operation Co., Ltd. was established in 2019 by a group of experienced experts from vaping businesses. We specialize in R&D, manufacturing, selling worldwide, logistics, and after-sales service, providing transparent experiences for end partners and end users.Our product portfolio includes a series of disposable vapes, pod systems, vape boot kits, and other vaping devices, each designed for performance, safety, and user satisfaction.

Our leading brand, NEVEN, expressed our commitment to quality without compromise. Thanks to NEVEN, we want to provide a premium vaping experience for the global market while maintaining competitive prices and coherent supply capacity.

Headquartered in Shenzhen, China, a modern and approved factory that uses the highest standards in the industry has a license to produce tobacco products and operate in strict quality control protocols. Our integrated supply chain allows us to quickly respond to market trends and personalization needs, helping our customers to stay first in a constantly developing industry.

NEVEN is aimed at becoming a reliable global brand in the vaping industry by integrating innovation into market demand. We are committed to providing safe, high-quality, and smart alternatives to traditional smoking, leading the future of the healthier lifestyle choice in the world.

Experience the pilot customers' everything we do. NEVEN mixes aesthetics with advanced technologies, respects quality values, integrity, and sustainability to provide reliable and comfortable vaping solutions suitable to the preferences of modern consumers.

Our mission is to provide highly profitable vaping products and high performance thanks to strict R&D and effective production. NEVEN tries to create a long-term partnership with distributors, brands, and retailers by ensuring the excellence of global products and services.

With approved high-level settings, strong R&D groups, and powerful supply chains, NEVEN offers a range of high-quality vaping products with competitive prices. We take care of personalization, quick distribution, and full-service solutions, which makes us a global partner of belief.

NEVEN's disposable vape collection is planned to meet the advancing needs of cutting-edge buyers, advertising comfort, unwavering quality, and uncommon execution. Our extent incorporates compact models for regular use as well as high-capacity gadgets conveying up to 12,000 puffs for expanded fulfillment. With smooth plans, natural airflow control systems, and rechargeable battery choices, NEVEN disposables offer a premium vaping encounter. Accessible in a wide cluster of expertly created flavors, our disposables provide users with both variety and quality. Whether you're new to vaping or an experienced user looking for high-performance arrangements, NEVEN delivers greatness with each puff.

Our production team follows the detailed work guidelines for each stage of the production process, ensuring that all operators are fully trained. We perform strict quality control, including incoming materials, process control, and 100%complete product testing. Important assessments such as bulging efficiency, aging testing, load/discharge, and vibration check/vibration are performed by strict specifications. We support our products with a function that includes complete replacement or refund, although quality issues are extremely rare.

Thanks to continuous efforts in optimizing the cost and efficiency of production and reducing waste, we are proud to provide products with one of the best price/performance ratios in the industry. Our strategic control over the supply of materials and factory costs allows us to maintain a very competitive price, which never affects the quality. At NEVEN, providing special value is the center of everything we do.

Excellent operation allows us to have a standard production time of 7 to 10 days. Whether your order has an SKU or more models with the number of changes, our production system is designed to be flexible. We offer reliable door-to-door guaranteed delivery windows to simplify your logistics. In addition, for foreign warehouses with a strategic location, we can guarantee a quick distribution and immediate availability for stored items.

Our professional customer service group is committed to supporting you at each stage鈥攆rom the initial requirement to the follow-up. With profound knowledge about the industry and proactive communication, we provide timely support on quotes, technical clarification, sampling coordination, production updates, transportation, and after-sales support. We responded quickly during the week and were easily available at the weekend to ensure your satisfaction and peace of mind.
Product Certificates of FDA (PMTA), TPD (EU-CEG), CE, FCC, ROHS etc

To ensure fast and reliable delivery, we maintain inventories in some warehouses in the region. When stocks are available locally, orders are usually shipped within 1 to 7 days depending on the payment. For example, our warehouse delivery in Germany reached German customers within 1 to 3 days and other EU destinations within 3 to 7 days. If the products are transported directly from China, the estimated time is about 2 weeks. We are committed to optimizing logistics and we will always strive to provide the shortest delivery time depending on your order and specific location.

Disposable Vapes for Each Lifestyle

[/fusion_title][fusion_text animation_direction="left" animation_speed="0.3" animation_delay="0" hide_on_mobile="small-visibility,medium-visibility,large-visibility" sticky_display="normal,sticky" font_size="18px" text_color="#666666" fusion_font_variant_text_font="400" fusion_font_family_text_font="Source Sans 3"]

NEVEN's disposable vape collection is planned to meet the advancing needs of cutting-edge buyers, advertising comfort, unwavering quality, and uncommon execution. Our extent incorporates compact models for regular use as well as high-capacity gadgets conveying up to 12,000 puffs for expanded fulfillment. With smooth plans, natural airflow control systems, and rechargeable battery choices, NEVEN disposables offer a premium vaping encounter. Accessible in a wide cluster of expertly created flavors, our disposables provide users with both variety and quality. Whether you're new to vaping or an experienced user looking for high-performance arrangements, NEVEN delivers greatness with each puff.

Strict Quality Control and Ensure

[/fusion_title][fusion_text animation_direction="left" animation_speed="0.3" animation_delay="0" hide_on_mobile="small-visibility,medium-visibility,large-visibility" sticky_display="normal,sticky" font_size="18px" text_color="#666666" fusion_font_variant_text_font="400" fusion_font_family_text_font="Source Sans 3"]

Our production team follows the detailed work guidelines for each stage of the production process, ensuring that all operators are fully trained. We perform strict quality control, including incoming materials, process control, and 100%complete product testing. Important assessments such as bulging efficiency, aging testing, load/discharge, and vibration check/vibration are performed by strict specifications. We support our products with a function that includes complete replacement or refund, although quality issues are extremely rare.

Our strategic control over the supply of materials and factory costs allows us to maintain a very competitive price, which never affects the quality. At NEVEN, providing special value is the center of everything we do.

Shipping Lead Time & Local Warehousing

[/fusion_title][fusion_text animation_direction="left" animation_speed="0.3" animation_delay="0" hide_on_mobile="small-visibility,medium-visibility,large-visibility" sticky_display="normal,sticky" font_size="18px" text_color="#666666" fusion_font_variant_text_font="400" fusion_font_family_text_font="Source Sans 3"]

To ensure fast and reliable delivery, we maintain inventories in some warehouses in the region. When stocks are available locally, orders are usually shipped within 1 to 7 days depending on the payment. For example, our warehouse delivery in Germany reached German customers within 1 to 3 days and other EU destinations within 3 to 7 days. If the products are transported directly from China, the estimated time is about 2 weeks. We are committed to optimizing logistics and we will always strive to provide the shortest delivery time depending on your order and specific location.

title: Products

children.content: NEVEN Cool Digital Box 12000 Puffs Disposable Vape

The NEVEN 12000DB is a best electric cigarette that combines style and performance. It has a trendy boxy design with smooth curved corners, a shiny chrome metal base and a colorful LED screen that gives it a bold impression. The outer shell is decorated with playful gorilla representations and cartoon graphics, adding an additional layer of coolness and fun. The 23ml premium e-liquid experience offers an impressive 12000 puffs with dense clouds and 0.8 ohm network coils for a great taste experience. The 550 MAH rechargeable battery guarantees long-term performance and allows easy loading of Type-C charging port. With 12 irresistible flavors available, NEVEN12000DB brings endless satisfaction to every vape session.
NEVEN Puff 12000 Disposable Vape with Flashing Neon Light

NEVEN 12000L is pre-filled with 25 ml of Premium e-liquid, offering an impressive 12000 puff for a long-lasting pleasure. The new vape offers a slim cylindrical design for a comfortable handle, presents internal circuit boards and components, and provides a transparent foundation that offers a remarkable modern aesthetic. The variations in each scent are combined with an overly unique cartoon artwork, which perfectly reflects individuality and a sense of freedom. On the transparent back there are six mini-RGB mains lights that run through vibrant red, green and blue colors to simultaneously shine and achieve a dynamic neon effect. Powered by a 600 mAh rechargeable battery with a practical Type-C charging port, the NEVEN12000L, built with a 1.0 ohm network coil, and the NEVEN12000L skinny vapes offers thick clouds of vaping and a rich taste experience. Choose 10 hand-bright, breathtaking flavors to increase all the vaping moments.
Stylish NEVEN Bang King Puff 12000 Disposable Vape

The NEVEN Bang King 12000BK is the best nicotine vape for anyone looking for both performance and style. This best electric cigarette is a favorite among vaper due to its unique and impressive cylindrical design. The slide cover mouthpiece keeps the soft tip clean and protects it from external contaminants when not in use. Equipped with 0.8 ohm network coils, create giant vaping clouds and enhance the vape experience with all puffs. A generous 23ml e-liquid capacity provides up to 12000 puffs to ensure long-term satisfaction and exceptional value. Driven by a 650 mAh rechargeable battery and a comfortable Type-C charging port, you can enjoy the drop of e-liquid with 10 delicious flavors.
NEVEN Innovative Puff 12000 Disposable Vape With LCD Display

The NEVEN 12000DSP is newest disposable vapes that combines exceptional performance with a unique LCD color display. The new vape product features a generous 22ml e-liquid capacity and an impressive 12000 puffs, providing long-term use and high value. The device features a 650 mAh rechargeable battery and a comfortable Type-C charging port to ensure continuous enjoyment. Popular designs in the boxing style not only enhance their aesthetic appeal, but also provide a comfortable grip for the ergonomic vaping experience. With 1.0 ohm network coils and adjustable airflow, users can enjoy thick clouds and adaptable drawing, enhancing the taste experience with a choice of 12 delicious flavors. NEVEN 12000DSP combines a high capacity, elegant design, LED display, impressive vaping production, and a variety of delicious flavors in one device. title: Stylish NEVEN Bang King Puff 12000 Disposable Vape

children.content: EB DESIRE Cool Digital Box 12000 Puffs Disposable Vape

The NEVEN Bang King 12000BK is the best nicotine vape for anyone looking for both performance and style. This best electric cigarette is a favorite among vaper due to its unique and impressive cylindrical design. The slide cover mouthpiece keeps the soft tip clean and protects it from external contaminants when not in use. Equipped with 0.8 ohm network coils, create giant vaping clouds and enhance the vape experience with all puffs. A generous 23ml e-liquid capacity provides up to 12000 puffs to ensure long-term satisfaction and exceptional value. Driven by a 650 mAh rechargeable battery and a comfortable Type-C charging port, you can enjoy the drop of e-liquid with 10 delicious flavors.

Puffs  Up to 12000
E-liquid 23ml
Coil  Mesh Coil
Resistance  0.8 ohm
Battery 650 mAh Rechargeable
Charging Port  Type-C
Size 46*46*124mm
EB DESIRE Cool Digital Box 12000 Puffs Disposable Vape

The impressive e-liquid capacity of the NEVEN 12000BK new disposable vape is 23 ml, offering up to 12000 puffs. With this super-sized capacity, you can always swap devices and enjoy durable vaping sessions without worrying exceptional price-performance ratios. Say goodbye to frequently swap out and enjoy a worry-free vaping experience.

What really stands out is its unique Bang King style and iconic sweet dome design. Not only does this device look stunning, this small vape also feels incredibly comfortable. Its impressive aesthetic and ergonomic design made it a favorite for vaping enthusiasts.

NEVEN 12000BK has a sliding blanket that gives the soft mouthpiece an additional layer of protection. If not in use, the mouthpiece is hidden under the cover to prevent external contamination. This clever design of the new vapes ensures that your device remains clean and offers the same fresh experience with every puff. The soft mouthpiece adds vaping comfort to a whole new level.
Large Vapor Clouds With The Latest Mesh Coil Technology

With mesh coils with 0.8 Ohm mesh coils produce large vapor clouds of the NEVEN 12000BK, improving taste intensity with all puffs. When you are sufficiently, experience a whole new level of satisfaction and indulge in aromatic clouds that will bring your favorite scents to life.

NEVEN 12000BK is powered by a robust 650 mAh rechargeable battery that can be easily loaded via a practical Type-C charging port. This allows you to enjoy all your e-liquid without dealing with batteries and providing a seamless, uninterrupted vaping experience.

Choose from 10 carefully selected flavors made with premium ingredients for food quality: Blueberry Ice, Peach Ice, Cherry Cola, Grape Ice, Watermelon Ice, Peach Mango Pineapple, Strawberry Watermelon, Blueberry Raspberry, Kiwi Passion Fruit, Strawberry Kiwi. Each flavor is crafted from high-quality food-grade ingredients ensuring a pure, natural vaping experience.

Individual Box  1* NV12000BK Disposable Vape
Middle Display Box  10pcs/pack
Quantity/CTN  200pcs (20 packs)
Gross Weight 22kg/CTN

The NEVEN Bang King 12000BK is the best nicotine vape for anyone looking for both performance and style. This best electric cigarette is a favorite among vaper due to its unique and impressive cylindrical design. The slide cover mouthpiece keeps the soft tip clean and protects it from external contaminants when not in use. Equipped with 0.8 ohm network coils, create giant vaping clouds and enhance the vape experience with all puffs. A generous 23ml e-liquid capacity provides up to 12000 puffs to ensure long-term satisfaction and exceptional value. Driven by a 650 mAh rechargeable battery and a comfortable Type-C charging port, you can enjoy the drop of e-liquid with 10 delicious flavors.

The impressive e-liquid capacity of the NEVEN 12000BK new disposable vape is 23 ml, offering up to 12000 puffs. With this super-sized capacity, you can always swap devices and enjoy durable vaping sessions without worrying exceptional price-performance ratios. Say goodbye to frequently swap out and enjoy a worry-free vaping experience.
